title: Secret of the Chateau
writer: Lawrence G. Blochman, Albert DeMond, Harry Behn
actors: Claire Dodd, Alice White, Osgood Perkins
plot: Inspector Marotte, attending an auction of rare collectible books previously owned by the recently murdered M. Le Duc de Poisse, hopes he can catch his old nemesis Prahec, a murderer and book thief.
